title: Pin @kody-ade/kody-engine version in brain:local script
body: The script uses `@latest`, which can break a developer's local checkout when a new major is published. Consider a documented minimum version (e.g. `@^1.0`) once the engine stabilizes its Brain API.
rationale: Currently fine for a dev tool, but `@latest` is a footgun for anyone scripting this in CI or a fixed dev environment.
